ariaSpec.usage: Describes the role of the component.

ariaSpec.attribute: label for or aria-label or aria-labelledby (when has accessible name)
ariaSpec.usage: The textarea requires an accessible name (provided by consuming app).
Required on role=textbox to indicate multi-line behavior. Implicit on native <textarea>, so not needed there.
Rendered only when the TextArea is in a form and announces the invalid state.
Points to the hint or error message for the textarea.
Rendered only when the TextArea is disabled.
